title: alnus tenuifolia var. occidentalis
intro: Alnus tenuifolia var. occidentalis, also known as the Rocky Mountain green alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree belonging to the alder family (Betulaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Alnus tenuifolia var. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function, making it a valuable herb in natural medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, bark, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
